author: Piyush Datta
name: SP8192 Depth Recurrence + Polar Express + Stacked SOTA on 4xA100
blurb: SP8192, 11L MLP4x, depth recurrence (NUM_LOOPS=1, layers 3-5), parallel residuals, Polar Express NS, MuonEq-R, SDClip GPTQ (int6+int8 embed, HESSIAN_CLIP_LAMBDA=0.175), brotli, SWA (157 ckpts, SWA_EVERY=1, warmdown=0.72, MIN_LR=0.10), half-batch (393K), score-first TTT (SGD lr=0.02, 1 epoch, 64K chunks).
